[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 101001101 5
3 010011000 3
4 000101110 4
5 110111000 5
6 010101001 4
7 111010100 5
